title: cota virescens
intro: Cota virescens, also known as the green cota, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Cota virescens include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of Cota virescens include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
